nasb.text: However, Israel did not burn any cities that stood on their mounds, except Hazor alone, which Joshua burned.

esv.text: But none of the cities that stood on mounds did Israel burn, except Hazor alone; that Joshua burned.

cnv.text: 至於那些立在土丘上的城，除了夏瑣以外，以色列人都沒有焚燒；約書亞只燒了夏瑣。

ccb.text: 以色列人只烧毁了夏琐，没有烧建在山丘上的其他城池。
